context: Tests whether the agent uses the googleapis package with the correct API version and authentication, uses custombatch for bulk updates rather than individual inserts, and correctly generates a supplemental TSV promotion feed with proper format and headers.

checklist.name: googleapis package
checklist.description: The implementation imports from `googleapis` (specifically `import { google } from 'googleapis'`) — not from a REST HTTP client, fetch wrapper, or unofficial Google library

checklist.name: Content API v2.1
checklist.description: The Content API client is initialised with `version: 'v2.1'` — not v1, v2, or another version string

checklist.name: GoogleAuth with content scope
checklist.description: Authentication uses `new google.auth.GoogleAuth(...)` with `keyFile` pointing to `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY_PATH` environment variable and the scope `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/content`

checklist.name: custombatch for bulk updates
checklist.description: Product updates use `content.products.custombatch(...)` — NOT a loop of individual `content.products.insert` or `content.products.update` calls

checklist.name: Batch method insert
checklist.description: Each entry in the custombatch request has `method: 'insert'`

checklist.name: batchId per entry
checklist.description: Each batch entry includes a `batchId` field (e.g., the array index)

checklist.name: Supplemental TSV format
checklist.description: The promotions feed is returned as TSV (tab-separated values or comma-separated with the specified columns), NOT as XML or JSON

checklist.name: TSV columns correct
checklist.description: The supplemental feed header row contains exactly `id,sale_price,sale_price_effective_date` (in that order)

checklist.name: sale_price_effective_date format
checklist.description: The `sale_price_effective_date` column is formatted as `startISO/endISO` — two ISO 8601 datetime strings separated by a forward slash `/`

checklist.name: TSV Content-Type header
checklist.description: The supplemental feed endpoint sets `Content-Type` to `text/tab-separated-values; charset=utf-8`

checklist.name: Price format in batch
checklist.description: Price in the batch payload uses a `{ value: '...', currency: '...' }` object where `value` is formatted with two decimal places (toFixed(2))

checklist.name: Batch size respect
checklist.description: The code batches or limits requests to a maximum of 1000 products per custombatch call (e.g., chunks the SKU list if over 1000)
